calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GABRIELA TORRES' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Motion DENIED without prejudice. The parties submitted a notice of settlement resolving the entire case. Moving party may renew the motion is the settlement falls through or is otherwise not enforced.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at: sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
